name: demogo
description: Publish projects from Codex to DemoGo and return shareable trial links.

interface.shortDescription: Publish projects as shareable trial links.
interface.longDescription: DemoGo helps Codex publish the current project as a shareable trial link. It can create a new link, update an existing link, check the project before publishing, and return practical failure guidance when publishing cannot complete.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this project can be published.
